title: avena alba f. fallax
intro: Avena alba f. fallax, also known as oat grass or fall oat grass, is a type of wild oat that is a variant of the common oat plant (Avena sativa). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Avena alba f. fallax include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Avena alba f. fallax often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
